metadata.description: Public Claude Code plugin marketplace for sharing useful development plugins and demonstrating best practices

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: A plugin for developer workflow automation including conventional commits and git operations

plugins.name: docs-kb
plugins.description: Progressive disclosure documentation system. Gives any project a docs/ directory that Claude navigates automatically based on task relevance.

plugins.name: fabro
plugins.description: Fabro dark-factory fluency for Claude Code: a workflow-author skill, the full docs.fabro.sh mirror for offline deep reference, and dot2mermaid for rendering workflow graphs in PRs.

plugins.name: maven
plugins.description: A toolkit for instructors on Maven. Currently includes a skill that audits Lightning Lesson signup pages against Maven's listing criteria for discoverability and featuring; more skills will be added as instructor needs surface.
